tasks_completed.name: Port ModelDB 189347 and similar DSGC compartmental models to NEURON
tasks_completed.key_finding: First DSGC port compiles clean but scores DSI 0.316 under rotation-proxy protocol, below envelope [0.70, 0.85]

tasks_completed.name: Calibrate dendritic diameters for dsgc-baseline-morphology
tasks_completed.key_finding: Per-Strahler-order taper grows surface area 7.99x and cuts axial resistance to 4.8% of placeholder baseline while keeping topology byte-identical

tasks_completed.name: Hunt DSGC compartmental models missed by prior survey; port runnable ones
tasks_completed.key_finding: 14 candidates, 3 HIGH-priority ports attempted; 0/3 reached the canonical 12-angle sweep due to structural driver incompatibility

tasks_completed.name: Response-visualisation library (firing rate vs angle graphs)
tasks_completed.key_finding: tuning_curve_viz library ships 4 plotting functions (Cartesian, polar, overlay, raster+PSTH) and emits 7 example PNGs under 5 s

tasks_completed.name: Tuning-curve scoring loss library
tasks_completed.key_finding: tuning_curve_loss library: 47/47 tests pass, identity loss = 0.0 on target curve, 4 registered metric keys wired

tasks_completed.name: Resolve dsgc-baseline-morphology source-paper provenance
tasks_completed.key_finding: Corrected morphology source DOI from a mis-cited unrelated paper to Morrie & Feller 2018 Current Biology via correction C-0013-01

tasks_completed.name: Brainstorm results session 3
tasks_completed.key_finding: Authorised five literature-survey tasks (t0015-t0019) and a $1 nominal budget bump to clear the literature-survey cost gate

tasks_completed.name: Cable-theory literature survey
tasks_completed.key_finding: 5 foundational cable-theory papers registered, 0/5 PDFs retrieved; 6-point compartmental-modelling spec synthesised from abstracts

tasks_completed.name: Dendritic-computation literature survey
tasks_completed.key_finding: 5 dendritic-computation papers registered; all 5 publisher-paywalled; motif transfer to DSGC dendrites synthesised as answer asset

tasks_completed.name: Patch-clamp literature survey
tasks_completed.key_finding: 5 patch-clamp / space-clamp papers registered, all paywalled; 7-point DSGC biophysics spec authored from abstracts plus training knowledge

tasks_completed.name: Synaptic-integration literature survey
tasks_completed.key_finding: 5 synaptic-integration priors papers registered; 0/5 PDFs retrieved; prior distribution tabulated per theme

tasks_completed.name: Voltage-gated-channel literature survey
tasks_completed.key_finding: 5 Nav/Kv papers registered, all paywalled; Nav/Kv-per-compartment prior table authored as answer asset

tasks_completed.name: Port ModelDB 189347 DSGC under native gabaMOD parameter-swap protocol
tasks_completed.key_finding: gabaMOD-swap variant lands DSI 0.7838 inside envelope [0.70, 0.85], but peak firing 14.85 Hz remains below envelope [40, 80] Hz

tasks_completed.name: Brainstorm results session 4
tasks_completed.key_finding: Authorised t0022 (channel testbed, active), and t0023 + t0024 as deferred ports pending t0022 outcomes

tasks_created.reason: Broaden corpus in the cable-theory category per brainstorm session 3

tasks_created.reason: Broaden corpus in the dendritic-computation category per brainstorm session 3

tasks_created.reason: Broaden corpus in the patch-clamp category per brainstorm session 3

tasks_created.reason: Broaden corpus in the synaptic-integration category per brainstorm session 3

tasks_created.name: Voltage-gated-channel literature survey
tasks_created.reason: Broaden corpus in the voltage-gated-channels category per brainstorm session 3

tasks_created.name: Port ModelDB 189347 DSGC under native gabaMOD parameter-swap protocol
tasks_created.reason: Retry the failed t0008 port using the paper's native gabaMOD swap instead of the rotation-proxy protocol

tasks_created.name: Brainstorm results session 4
tasks_created.reason: Decide the next batch of tasks after the literature-survey wave and the gabaMOD port landed

tasks_created.name: Modify DSGC port with spatially-asymmetric inhibition for channel testbed
tasks_created.reason: Produce a channel-modular DSGC testbed that yields dendritic-computation DS under the 12-angle sweep

tasks_created.name: Port Hanson 2019 DSGC model
tasks_created.reason: Second NEURON implementation for cross-model comparison; created intervention_blocked, deferred pending t0022 outcomes

tasks_created.name: Port de Rosenroll 2026 DSGC model
tasks_created.reason: Third NEURON implementation with modern channel mechanisms; created intervention_blocked, deferred pending t0022 outcomes

key_findings: First DSGC port (t0008) compiles clean but scores DSI 0.316 under the rotation-proxy protocol, well below envelope [0.70, 0.85]
gabaMOD-swap variant (t0020) lands DSI 0.7838 inside envelope; peak firing 14.85 Hz remains below envelope [40, 80] Hz
Per-Strahler-order morphology calibration (t0009) grows dendritic surface area 7.99x and drops axial resistance to 4.8% of the placeholder baseline
Morphology provenance corrected (t0013): source DOI changed from a mis-cited unrelated paper to Morrie & Feller 2018 Current Biology
Hunt for missed DSGC models (t0010) logged 14 candidates but 0/3 HIGH-priority ports cleared the P2 structural gate
Scoring library (t0012, 47/47 tests) and visualisation library (t0011, 4 plotting functions) land as reusable libraries
Five literature surveys (t0015-t0019) add 25 paper assets, but all 25 PDFs are paywalled and escalate to Sheffield institutional access
Brainstorm session 4 (t0021) spawns t0022 (active channel testbed) and t0023/t0024 as deferred ports
